exampleSentences: Chị có thể giúp em kiểm tra chất lượng của hàng trong kho không?
Anh muốn đặt thêm hàng để bán trong cửa hàng của mình.
Sáng nay, em nhận được một lô hàng mới từ nhà cung cấp.
notes:
hàng = goods, merchandise — physical things that are bought and sold.

It’s a noun. No plural form; quantity is shown with words like lô hàng (a batch), kiện hàng (a package), món hàng (an item). Very common pairing: hàng hóa (goods, more formal/complete sound).

Another very common meaning is row / line (like a line of people or things), and from that you get xếp hàng = to line up.

You’ll also see it inside compound words: cửa hàng (shop), khách hàng (customer — literally “goods-line person,” think: person related to buying goods).
notes_md:
**hàng** = goods, merchandise — physical things that are bought and sold.

It’s a noun. No plural form; quantity is shown with words like **lô hàng** (a batch), **kiện hàng** (a package), **món hàng** (an item). Very common pairing: **hàng hóa** (goods, more formal/complete sound).

Another very common meaning is **row / line** (like a line of people or things), and from that you get **xếp hàng** = to line up.

You’ll also see it inside compound words: **cửa hàng** (shop), **khách hàng** (customer — literally “goods-line person,” think: person related to buying goods).

example.en: I need to buy new goods.

definitions.vi: Hàng hóa hoặc mặt hàng đang được bán.
definitions.es: Bienes o artículos que están a la venta.
definitions.en: Goods or items that are for sale.

exampleSentencesTranslated: Can you help me check the quality of the goods in the warehouse?
I want to order more goods to sell in my store.
This morning, I received a new shipment of goods from the supplier.
